---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for the Headlamp OpenFeature plugin
title: '[Feature]: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? A clear and concise description of
what the problem is. E.g. "I'm always frustrated when [...]".

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've
considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
